voss.name: Dr. Emil Voss
voss.greeting:
You look like a ghost.
Nightmares keeping you up again?

system.help_text: WASD - move   E - interact   ESC - quit
system.msg_therapy:
The nightmare has been defeated.
The fear has receded.
system.msg_failure:
The nightmare consumed you...
But you woke up.
system.msg_neutral:
You escaped from the nightmare.
The fear remains.
